event: Stormy seascape clearing off the coast of Sicily
description: A dramatic seascape shows powerful waves crashing against dark rocky outcroppings along a rugged coastline. The sky is filled with heavy dark clouds, but a break in the clouds near the left allows golden light to stream through, illuminating the churning foam. Birds fly in the distance. The sea stretches to the horizon under the turbulent sky. The palette is dark with deep greens, grays, and flashes of golden light.

_meta.title: It clears up, coast of Sicily
